sales.description:
JUDAEA. John Hyrcanus I, 135-104 B.C.E. AE 1/2 Prutah, Jerusalem Mint. NGC FINE.
To view all items from the Rabbi Victor H. Weissberg and Tamar Weissberg Collection, click  here.
HGC-10, 633; Hendin-6170. Obverse: Paleo-Hebrew inscription above and below palm branch; Reverse: Rose between grain ears. A SCARCE and diminutive bronze issue with attractive reddish patina. Reverse is off-center, but the obverse remains readily identifiable.

From the Rabbi Victor H. Weissberg and Tamar Weissberg Co...
